page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Parallel and checkpointable tool implementing a composite ratio test for detecting selective sweeps. sweed is based on the sweepfinder algorithm. sweed can calculate the theoretical sfs of a give demographic model (stepwise changes or with an exponential growth phase + stepwise changes) using the method of zickovic and stephan (2011).
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Parallel and checkpointable tool implementing a composite ratio test for detecting selective sweeps. SweeD is based on the SweepFinder algorithm. SweeD can calculate the theoretical SFS of a give demographic model (stepwise changes or with an exponential growth phase + stepwise changes) using the method of Zickovic and Stephan (2011).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Parallel and checkpointable tool implementing a composite ratio test for detecting selective sweeps. SweeD is based on the SweepFinder algorithm. SweeD can calculate the theoretical SFS of a give demographic model (stepwise changes or with an exponential growth phase + stepwise changes) using the method of Zickovic and Stephan (2011).
